content.situation: 你在农贸市场想买苹果，摊主说苹果是每磅4美元，你认为价格偏高，想试探是否有更便宜的选择。
content.speakerText: The apples are $4 a pound. Very sweet and fresh!
content.speakerTextCn: 苹果四美元一磅，非常甜且新鲜！

blanks.answer: Do you have any cheaper ones
options: Do you have any cheaper ones
Can you give me free apples

content.hint: 当觉得价格高时，礼貌地询问是否有更便宜的选项
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌询问替代选项以比较性价比

content.situation: 你想买香蕉，摊主说每磅2.5美元，你想买三磅，但希望对方能稍微降价。
content.speakerText: Bananas are $2.50 a pound. Good deal!

options: Can you give me one free

content.hint: 请求降价时，用 'Could you lower it...' 比直接说 'Reduce it' 更礼貌
content.knowledgePoint: 使用情态动词礼貌提出价格协商

content.situation: 你比较了两种橙子，一种每磅3美元，另一种每磅2.75美元，你决定买较便宜的，但想确认是否能多拿一点。
content.speakerText: These oranges are $2.75 a pound. The others are more expensive.
content.speakerTextCn: 这些橙子每磅2.75美元，其他的更贵。
content.responseTemplate: I'll take two pounds of these. ___?

blanks.answer: Could I get an extra half pound for free
options: Could I get an extra half pound for free
Can you wrap them in plastic
Do you have any on sale

content.hint: 在决定购买后，可以轻松地请求额外赠品，语气要自然
content.knowledgePoint: 在确定购买后自然提出赠品请求
